metadata.description: Environment name used in naming and tagging.
Azure region for the Log Analytics workspace and workbook.
Optional email address for the incident response action group. Leave blank to skip action group deployment.
Deploy scheduled query alert rules for the three incident-response signal families. Disabled by default for a dashboard-first, low-noise setup.
Create the high-severity errors alert when scheduled alerts are enabled. Disabled by default because it is the noisiest signal family.
Create the authentication anomalies alert when scheduled alerts are enabled. Enabled by default because sign-in abuse is worth monitoring proactively.
Create the service health regressions alert when scheduled alerts are enabled. Enabled by default because heartbeat gaps are a reasonable low-noise operational signal.
How often the scheduled query alerts evaluate their queries. The default favors lower noise over fast paging.
The query window used by the scheduled query alerts. The default favors lower noise over fast paging.
Minimum aggregated high-severity events required before the failure alert fires. The default is intentionally conservative for dashboard-first deployments.
Minimum aggregated failed sign-in attempts required before the authentication alert fires. The default is intentionally conservative for dashboard-first deployments.
Minimum affected resources required before the service regression alert fires. The default is intentionally conservative for dashboard-first deployments.

variables.$fxv#0:
let lookback = 24h;
union isfuzzy=true withsource=SourceTable AppExceptions, AppTraces, AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback)
| extend SeverityValue = coalesce(
    tolong(column_ifexists('SeverityLevel', 0)),
    tolong(column_ifexists('Level', 0)),
    0
)
| extend Message = coalesce(
    tostring(column_ifexists('OuterMessage', '')),
    tostring(column_ifexists('Message', '')),
    tostring(column_ifexists('RenderedDescription', '')),
    tostring(column_ifexists('ResultDescription', ''))
)
| where SeverityValue >= 3 or Message has_any ('critical', 'fatal', 'panic', 'sev0', 'sev1', 'high priority')
| summarize EventCount = count(), LatestEvent = max(TimeGenerated) by SourceTable, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
variables.$fxv#1:
let lookback = 24h;
union isfuzzy=true SigninLogs, AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback)
| extend FailureReason = coalesce(tostring(ResultDescription), tostring(Status.failureReason))
| extend ResultCode = tostring(ResultType)
| where ResultCode !in ('0', 'Success') or isnotempty(FailureReason)
| summarize FailedAttempts = count(), DistinctIPs = dcount(IPAddress), LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated) by UserPrincipalName, AppDisplayName
| where FailedAttempts >= 5 or DistinctIPs >= 3
| order by FailedAttempts desc, DistinctIPs desc
variables.$fxv#2:
let lookback = 6h;
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback)
| summarize HeartbeatCount = count(), LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer, _ResourceId
| extend MinutesSinceLastHeartbeat = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastHeartbeat)
| where MinutesSinceLastHeartbeat > 10 or HeartbeatCount < 3
| project Computer, _ResourceId, LastHeartbeat, MinutesSinceLastHeartbeat, HeartbeatCount
| order by MinutesSinceLastHeartbeat desc
variables.highSeverityAlertQuery:
[format('{0}
| summarize AggregatedValue = sum(EventCount)', replace(variables('$fxv#0'), 'let lookback = 24h;', 'let lookback = 30m;'))]
variables.authenticationAlertQuery:
[format('{0}
| summarize AggregatedValue = sum(FailedAttempts)', replace(variables('$fxv#1'), 'let lookback = 24h;', 'let lookback = 60m;'))]
variables.serviceRegressionAlertQuery:
[format('{0}
| summarize AggregatedValue = count()', replace(variables('$fxv#2'), 'let lookback = 6h;', 'let lookback = 60m;'))]

scheduledAlerts.name: [format('sqr-ir-high-errors-{0}-{1}', parameters('environment'), variables('suffix'))]
scheduledAlerts.description: Raises an alert when high-severity exceptions or diagnostics spike inside the alert window.

scheduledAlerts.name: [format('sqr-ir-auth-anomalies-{0}-{1}', parameters('environment'), variables('suffix'))]
scheduledAlerts.description: Raises an alert when repeated failed sign-in activity breaches the configured threshold.

scheduledAlerts.name: [format('sqr-ir-service-regressions-{0}-{1}', parameters('environment'), variables('suffix'))]
scheduledAlerts.description: Raises an alert when heartbeat gaps indicate degraded or missing service telemetry.

variables.scheduledQueryRuleIds: [concat(if(parameters('enableHighSeverityAlert'), createArray(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/scheduledQueryRules', variables('scheduledAlerts')[0].name)), createArray()), if(parameters('enableAuthenticationAlert'), createArray(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/scheduledQueryRules', variables('scheduledAlerts')[1].name)), createArray()), if(parameters('enableServiceRegressionAlert'), createArray(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/scheduledQueryRules', variables('scheduledAlerts')[2].name)), createArray()))]

properties.description: Operational workbook for KQL-driven incident response.

resources.name: [variables('scheduledAlerts')[copyIndex()].name]
resources.properties: [shallowMerge(createArray(createObject('autoMitigate', false(), 'checkWorkspaceAlertsStorageConfigured', false(), 'criteria', createObject('allOf', createArray(createObject('criterionType', 'StaticThresholdCriterion', 'failingPeriods', createObject('minFailingPeriodsToAlert', 1, 'numberOfEvaluationPeriods', 1), 'metricMeasureColumn', 'AggregatedValue', 'operator', 'GreaterThan', 'query', variables('scheduledAlerts')[copyIndex()].query, 'threshold', variables('scheduledAlerts')[copyIndex()].threshold, 'timeAggregation', 'Average'))), 'description', variables('scheduledAlerts')[copyIndex()].description, 'displayName', variables('scheduledAlerts')[copyIndex()].displayName, 'enabled', true(), 'evaluationFrequency', parameters('alertEvaluationFrequency'), 'muteActionsDuration', 'PT30M', 'overrideQueryTimeRange', parameters('alertWindowSize'), 'scopes', createArray(resourceId('Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces', variables('logAnalyticsName'))), 'severity', variables('scheduledAlerts')[copyIndex()].severity, 'skipQueryValidation', false(), 'targetResourceTypes', createArray('Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces'), 'windowSize', parameters('alertWindowSize')), if(empty(variables('alertActionGroupIds')), createObject(), createObject('actions', createObject('actionGroups', variables('alertActionGroupIds'), 'customProperties', createObject('Project', 'KQL-Incident-Response-Dashboard', 'Signal', variables('scheduledAlerts')[copyIndex()].signal))))))]
